model: WRX STI S207 NBR CHALLENGE PACKAGE
prestazioni: Engine: EJ207 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals, 8.0:1 compression) with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate for precise boost control at 2.2 bar (32 psi) peak pressure. Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH dual-pump setup, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator for consistent E85 delivery.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed close-ratio transmission reinforced with a PPG straight-cut gearset (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 2.062, 3rd: 1.545) and a Cusco Type-RS 2.5-way limited-slip differential. Clutch upgraded to a Tilton 7.25" triple-plate ceramic unit with a billet flywheel for 800+ lb-ft torque capacity. Driveshaft replaced with a Tomioka Racing carbon-fiber unit to reduce rotational mass.

Suspension/Chassis: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound) with custom valving for the S207’s NBR Challenge-spec subframe. Polyurethane bushings replaced with SuperPro 90D durometer units at all critical points (control arms, subframe, differential mounts). Brembo GT-R 380mm 2-piece rotors with 6-piston calipers (front) and 355mm 4-piston calipers (rear), paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: STI NBR Challenge Package front splitter extended with a custom carbon-fiber Gurney flap (30mm height) and reinforced with titanium support rods. Rear wing replaced with a dry carbon-fiber Voltex Type-7 (1,100mm width, 300mm chord) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated DRS-style actuator for drag reduction. Side skirts upgraded to STI’s NBR-spec carbon-fiber units with integrated NACA ducts for rear brake cooling.

Body: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion using STI’s NBR Challenge Package fenders (flared 50mm per side) and a custom dry carbon-fiber hood with a 100mm central vent for heat extraction. Rear bumper modified with a diffuser from the STI S208, featuring integrated exhaust cutouts for a custom titanium Akrapović Evolution Line exhaust system (90mm dual outlets).

Interior: Recaro SP-G seats (carbon-fiber shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Schroth 6-point harnesses and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point design with door bars) by AutoPower Industries. Steering wheel replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display. Shift knob upgraded to a weighted titanium unit from STI’s NBR Challenge Package, paired with a Cusco short shifter (30% reduction in throw).
